faq.title: Everything you need to know.
faq.description: Common questions about 150% — and if something is missing, our team replies in under a business day.

digital-worker.question: What is a digital worker?
digital-worker.answer: A digital worker is an agent powered by artificial intelligence designed to support a specific function within an organization. It can help with training, knowledge access, service, sales and operations using the organization's existing information and processes.

implementation-time.question: How long does it take to implement a solution?
implementation-time.answer: Every project is different. We usually start with a specific use case, build a pilot and measure results before scaling to other areas of the organization.

replaces-people.question: Does Humanika replace people?
replaces-people.answer: No. Digital workers are designed to work alongside people, helping them access information faster, automate repetitive tasks and improve their productivity.

integrations.question: Can it connect with our systems and tools?
integrations.answer: Yes. Digital workers can integrate with collaboration platforms, CRMs, document systems and other enterprise tools to access information and support business processes.

documents.question: Do I need my documents organized to get started?
documents.answer: Not necessarily. During the implementation process we help identify, structure and prepare the information needed so the digital worker can deliver value.

engagement-model.question: How does the engagement model work?
engagement-model.answer: Humanika operates through an initial implementation and continuous operation model. This allows us to design, launch and evolve digital workers aligned with each organization's needs.

vs-tools.question: What makes Humanika different from tools like ChatGPT or Claude?
vs-tools.answer: Tools like ChatGPT or Claude generate answers. Humanika helps organizations turn that potential into concrete solutions for training, knowledge, service, sales and operations. We design digital workers aligned with real business processes, goals and needs.
